name: spec-driven-development
description: Personal spec-driven development workflow: constitution, spec, tech plan, task breakdown, and focused implementation — with human review gates enforced by a guardrail hook, a status lifecycle, /spec-cleanup for issue hygiene, and /auto to run everything after spec approval autonomously through to an open PR. Specs, plans, and tasks all live in one GitHub issue per feature (tasks as a native checklist) so the repo stays clean. Requires the gh CLI and a GitHub remote.
